title: Avuae Sea
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Avuae Sea''' was the only above-ground [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Carosi XII]]. The [[Carosite]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Newlife Point]] was situated on the shores of the Avuae, and the sea's marine life provided the Carosites with a steady supply of protein. The natives also frequently enjoyed swimming in its icy waters.

{{Nature-stub}}
